'''Wullerton''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Draenell's Point]], located on the continent of [[Mee'r]].<ref name="GK" /> It was the location of the [[Planetary Communications Commission]].<ref name="CTB">{{WEGCite|story=Changing the Balance|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Kit}}</ref>

{{City-stub}}
